title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Backend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
